text: The board shall adopt rules as necessary to implement and administer this subchapter.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.153 — Rules

The board shall adopt rules as necessary to implement and administer this subchapter.

*Added by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 594 (S.B.604), Sec. 3.01, eff. September 1, 2019.*

subsections.text: The board shall adopt rules as necessary to implement and administer this subchapter.
